description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:2.7-slim Docker image. Add a before_script that runs python --version to verify the interpreter. Define a test job named test in the default test stage that runs the following commands in order: pip install nose==1.3.7 coverage==4.2, pip install -r requirements.txt, and nosetests --with-coverage --cover-package=mcmweb --cover-xml. The job has no caches, artifacts, or special rules, so it runs on every pipeline execution.
